license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xspfndn
title: Preparation of the adenylated oligonucleotide for mapping 3′OH RNA termini
author: Matus Valach

steps_raw.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes at 85 °C to inactivate the enzyme.
The adenylated oligo can be directly used for RNA ligation with T4 RNA ligase 2 (optimally with T4 RNA Ligase 2, truncated KQ ( NEB #M0373)).
